headlines.title: Farage's rivals rule out standing in Clacton by-election
headlines.description: The Reform UK leader says he wants an "establishment versus the people by-election" but Labour calls it a "circus".

headlines.title: Amber heat health alerts in effect as UK set for one of longest-lasting heatwaves since 1976
headlines.description: Temperatures are set to rise as high as 36C (97F) for parts of southern England this week.

headlines.title: Virgin Media fined after hanging up on customers trying to cancel contracts
headlines.description: Millions of phone calls from customers were "likely mishandled" over nearly a three-year period, the regulator says.

headlines.title: Tom Holland on how getting Odyssey role was 'a real pinch-me moment'
headlines.description: The Spider-Man star and other cast members talk about the hotly anticipated Christopher Nolan movie.

headlines.title: Has Harry's war with the press finally run out of road?
headlines.description: The Duke of Sussex and six others have lost their High Court privacy case against the publisher of the Daily Mail and Mail on Sunday.

headlines.title: How the leasehold revolution could transform neighbourly relations
headlines.description: The government wants to abolish leasehold, but replacing it could prove far more complicated

headlines.title: International manhunt after mother and two children found dead at home
headlines.description: Bedfordshire Police says it believes the suspect officers are looking for has left the country.

headlines.title: Nato allies announce £37bn for new missile project
headlines.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer will convene around a dozen leaders to discuss the programme in Ankara.

headlines.title: Extreme marine heatwave expected for parts of UK with risk to sea life, Met Office warns
headlines.description: Scientists fear that high sea temperatures could have wide-ranging consequences for marine life.

headlines.title: 'It is not normal' - but extraordinary Djokovic defies odds once again
headlines.description: It is worth remembering that what you are watching is not normal - but Novak Djokovic is anything but ordinary in another thrilling Wimbledon match.

headlines.title: More protein or less? The foods to get you through a heatwave
headlines.description: When turning on the oven is a no-no and you're bored of salads, these foods (and drinks) will help to beat the heat.

headlines.title: Your tips from the last heatwave on how to cope in extreme temperatures
headlines.description: From what to wear to getting a restful night's sleep, you share your tips for beating the heat.

headlines.title: Six ways to keep your home and yourself cool
headlines.description: Six simple things you can do to help keep your house cool when temperatures rise.

headlines.title: What does hot weather do to the body?
headlines.description: Hot weather during the summer can affect anyone, but some people run a greater risk of serious harm.

headlines.title: From mouthwash to hair dye: How weight-loss jabs are changing shopping habits
headlines.description: The BBC looks at how spending habits have shifted as users report feeling less hungry.

headlines.title: Will Le Pen rise again? French nationalist leader defiant after court's ruling
headlines.description: Within hours of a court of appeal confirming a guilty verdict, Marine Le Pen had already launched her presidential campaign.

headlines.title: Fears of a massacre in this city on the front line of Sudan's war

headlines.title: What must British wildcard Arthur Fery do to become Wimbledon semi-finalist?
headlines.description: Arthur Fery is bidding to become the fifth British man to reach the Wimbledon semi-finals in the Open era - here is how he can beat Italian 10th seed Flavio Cobolli.

headlines.title: Russian fuel shortages bite – but will Putin change tack in Ukraine war?
headlines.description: Even in Moscow, authorities are unable to guarantee fuel supplies, but will economic pressure lead to talks or escalation?

headlines.title: Tears of relief? Messi adds another incredible chapter to World Cup career
headlines.description: Argentina great Lionel Messi sheds tears as they fight back to beat Egypt and reach the World Cup quarter-finals.

headlines.title: England players to be told not to jump hoardings
headlines.description: England players will be advised not to jump over advertising hoardings after Jordan Henderson suffered a freak injury.

headlines.title: Watch: Gaza football fans watch World Cup from rubble

headlines.title: 'Lifeless' three-year-old resuscitated by heroes after pond rescue

headlines.title: Southport Inquiry to examine role of social media
headlines.description: The hearings will investigate how the internet and social media influences violent individuals.

headlines.title: Dallas Cowboys player who died by suicide diagnosed with brain disease
headlines.description: Marshawn Kneeland had early chronic traumatic encephalopathy, which is caused by head impacts and has been found in hundreds of former NFL players.

headlines.title: Trains and emergency calls affected after major outage at Australia's largest telecoms company
headlines.description: Servers at data centres in Sydney and Melbourne were to blame but the exact cause remains unknown.

headlines.title: Smuggler accepts most of his drugs mules 'will get caught'
headlines.description: A smuggler taunts the government even though the UK Border Force is seizing record amounts of cannabis.

headlines.title: The places where it's cheaper to holiday this summer

headlines.title: Search under way after Boeing 737 plane vanishes off Pakistan coast
headlines.description: The plane, carrying five people, rapidly descended before losing contact, authorities say.

headlines.title: Why Newcastle target Manzambi is in demand
